title: Fit a model into GPU memory
description: Reduce memory pressure through batch size, gradient accumulation, and mixed precision instead of silently truncating data.
body: Steps: 1. Read the actual OOM message — activations, not just weights, dominate. 2. Lower the batch size and use gradient accumulation to keep the effective batch. 3. Enable mixed precision (fp16/bf16) to roughly halve activation memory. 4. Use gradient checkpointing for deep models to trade compute for memory. 5. Confirm the metric is unchanged by the smaller physical batch. Rollback point: before enabling mixed precision if numerics destabilize. Validation: training completes within memory and the effective-batch metric matches the original; a quietly reduced batch that changes the learning dynamics is a hidden regression.
